requirements.title: Define source-backed local recommendation rules and validation helpers.
acceptance: Recommendation facts cite maestro-flow source paths.
Validation detects missing sourceRefs and invalid command references.
Equal-rank recommendations can be represented without fake primary selection.

requirements.title: Replace single-path scenario rendering with branch-aware canvas-first UI.
acceptance: Users can start from a central scenario/state node.
Users can expand multiple route branches.
Recommendation cards show rationale and source evidence.

requirements.title: Persist local route history with favorites and evidence snapshots.
acceptance: Favorite routes are not evicted by recent cap.

constraints.constraint: Introduce local CommandRuleSet before UI depends on recommendation output.
Recommendation facts and rules must cite maestro-flow/ source paths.
Use authored/simple coordinates or auto-layout at implementer discretion.

domain.problem_statement: Implement Phase 2 Local Canvas Recommender for Maestro Workflow Wiki.

non_goals.title: Real .workflow/state.json parsing
non_goals.rationale: Static MVP uses simulated browser state.

non_goals.title: Browser-runtime LLM calls
non_goals.rationale: Recommendations must be local and explainable.

insights.summary: Plan should sequence rule/data contracts, branch-aware state, canvas UI, persistence, then tests.
Independent agent/delegate evidence was incomplete; keep plan granular and validation-heavy.

open_questions.question: Use authored coordinates, tree layout, swimlanes, or auto-layout for Phase 2 MVP?
